conditions: Probation must be agreed in writing
Either party may terminate during probation; otherwise it converts to a permanent role
illegalIf: Probation extended beyond 6 months by amendment
exploitativeIf: Successive probationary periods used to avoid converting the role to permanent

conditions: Statutory minimums apply unless a CBA grants longer terms
illegalIf: Employer notice shorter than statutory minimum for the employee's tenure
Employee held to longer notice than the employer without compensating mechanism
exploitativeIf: Notice for the employee set at 3+ months while employer keeps statutory minimum

conditions: Restrictions must be reasonable in scope, duration, and geography
Must protect a legitimate business interest (trade secrets, key client relationships)
Compensation typically required for the restricted period
illegalIf: Duration exceeds what is reasonable for the role
No compensation offered for the restricted period
exploitativeIf: Geographic scope covers all of Sweden for an entry-level role

conditions: Standard ordinary working time is 40 hours per week
Maximum 48 hours per week averaged over 4 months including overtime
At least 11 consecutive hours of daily rest per 24h
At least 36 consecutive hours of weekly rest per 7 days
illegalIf: Ordinary scheduled time above 40 hours per week
Average weekly hours above 48 over 4 months
Daily rest under 11 hours or weekly rest under 36 hours
